data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of rewarding regular customers, but the evidence does not demonstrate any mechanism or implementation that fulfills this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need to reward regular customers, yet there is no evidence of a loyalty program or any specific rewards being offered to regular customers in the prior steps. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of a mechanism to reward regular customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement loyalty rewards mechanism
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define and implement a rewards system for regular customers.
